name: Task workflow end to end
description: Verify the main task flow from idea to strategy, campaign board, task detail, human approval, and Approved status without publishing externally.

planSteps.description: If the strategy wizard is not already visible, click the New campaign from an idea entry on Home.
Enter the idea: I built an AI tool that verifies AI-generated code before engineering teams merge pull requests.
Click Think it through and wait for the strategy draft to finish loading.
Verify that the strategy draft shows What I heard, audience candidates, positioning angles, and content pillars.
Click "Lock it → draft my first content" and wait for the AI team handoff to complete, treating the "Your AI team is on it" stage list as an in-progress state.
Verify that the page confirms the strategy was locked, shows a First content section, and exposes an Open in workspace action.
Open the generated campaign in the workspace using the available Open in workspace action, or navigate to Campaigns and open the newest campaign.
Verify that the campaign Board tab shows Plan, Draft, In review, and Approved columns.
Open the first generated asset task card in Draft, In review, or Approved. Prefer an item awaiting review when one exists.
Verify that the task detail panel shows the drafted content and review controls.
If an Approve action is available, approve the task. If the task is already Approved, leave it unchanged and continue.
Verify that the task moves out of the review queue or is visible in the Approved column/status.
Verify that the Results tab is reachable, but do not click Publish all.
